About Organization

MP High Court is the high court of the state of Madhya Pradesh. It was established in 1956.
The court has a sanctioned strength of 42 judges.

About the Programme

The MP High Court Senior Computer Programmer Assistant Recruitment 2026 is a government job opportunity for Indian citizens. The recruitment is for 130 vacancies.
The objective of the programme is to recruit qualified candidates for the position of Senior Computer Programmer Assistant.

CareerFlora Expert Insight

The MP High Court Senior Computer Programmer Assistant Recruitment 2026 is a great opportunity for Indian citizens to work in the government sector. The recruitment process is open for 130 vacancies, and the application process is offline.
The eligibility criteria for the recruitment include a BE / B.Tech degree in CS / IT / Electronics and Telecommunication / BCA / MCA / M.SC Electronics / CS / IT, and the age limit is 45 years. The application start date is 20 July 2026, and the application end date is 10 August 2026.

CareerFlora Expert Insight Continued

The competition for the recruitment is expected to be high, and the candidates are advised to prepare well for the examination. The syllabus for the examination is available in the official notification, and the candidates are advised to read it carefully.
The MP High Court Senior Computer Programmer Assistant Recruitment 2026 is a great opportunity for candidates who are looking for a government job in the field of computer science and information technology. The candidates are advised to apply for the recruitment as soon as possible and to prepare well for the examination.
